fields.summary: User Login with Email and Password
fields.description: As a user, I want to log in with my email and password so that I can access my dashboard.
fields.customfield_10014:
Given a registered user
When they enter valid credentials
Then they should be redirected to dashboard

Given an unregistered email
When they attempt login
Then they should see an error message

Given a registered user with wrong password
When they attempt login
Then they should see invalid credentials error
